ranked_matches.title: Pakistan Super League: Quetta Gladiators vs Karachi Kings (Starts 07:00 UTC)
West Indies Women vs Australia Women (1st ODI) (Starts 11:00 UTC)

summary: The Sheffield Shield Final between Victoria and South Australia is currently in progress. The Pakistan Super League match between Quetta Gladiators and Karachi Kings is scheduled to start shortly at 07:00 UTC. The first Women's ODI between West Indies Women and Australia Women is scheduled for 11:00 UTC.
